title: JOHN BEFORE MONTREAL
subtitle: CAMEO · II·Priestess · 9:14 PM · The night before he flies
epigraph_upright: John takes the long way over from the diner. His flight is at 6:14 in the morning. He has, in his coat pocket, the folded napkin from booth six. He has, in his other coat pocket, the email he printed out because he has not, in seven days, decided whether to send it.
epigraph_reversed: Elicia opens the door. He stands on the porch with the printed email. He does not, this night, give it to her. He goes to the airport without having said the thing.
scene_description: Medium cameo. The Fool's threshold at the Priestess's haunted bungalow on the night John leaves Graustark. The mirror shard is on the third shelf. The basil is on its way out. The choose-your-own-adventure is on the script page on the side table.
direction_hint: Connect with three of Elicia's visitors. Reach the front door. Leap toward the airport with the thing given.
opening_log_lines: 9:14 PM. John on the porch. The cicadas at the dusk-frequency.
He has the napkin in one pocket. He has the printed email in the other.
The bungalow door is open a crack.

stagnation_thresholds.label: you have, on the porch, been here for fourteen minutes already.
the cicadas are louder than the door creaking open.
you got back in the car without going in.

doubt_thresholds.label: john at the threshold of the bungalow.
the printed email is folded in the wrong direction.
the shard is on the third shelf. you can see it through the doorway.
the flight tomorrow becomes a flight you go on alone.

notes: Medium cameo · John before Montreal. The Fool's leap at the Priestess's threshold. He has been carrying the email for seven days. The bungalow is the room where the leap could land.
ambient_pool: the door is open a crack. the room behind it is the room.
the printed email in your coat pocket is, by now, soft at the folds.
